name: Strong Stock Pullback V1
description: Research-only pullback setup in a strong stock: price remains above longer-term trend, has positive 60-day strength, and pulls back near SMA20 with controlled volume.

rules: close is near SMA20 pullback zone

notes: This is a stronger-stock variant of the existing Pullback To 20 DMA setup.
It avoids sector data and uses only cached daily OHLCV-derived features.
